title: Building the App Store for Agentic Engineering
summary: Cole Medin is building a workflow marketplace for Archon, a platform that enables agentic engineering through YAML-defined workflows running in isolated git worktrees. The marketplace allows users to install and share battle-tested AI coding workflows rather than rebuilding them privately.
